Pilot running.

journal.improvement: REGISTER-EXPLICIT ABI propagation: apply_static_abi now forces input register to disasm reg_args when slots==0 (was stdcall-only). Composes with capability 15 (vestigial-this): SKILLS getter arg in EAX now marshals via orig_regs. Validated + regression-safe. Re-pilot running.

OR do struct-member pointer arithmetic (->pItemStatCostCompiledBase + 0x1626) passed to the delegate now DEFER to shadow-first. Not-abort but uncatchably-faults on degenerate capture. journal.improvement: UNRESOLVABLE-DELEGATE -> SHADOW-FIRST: delegate getters whose callee is not in the resolve table now route to shadow_leaf_pending + shadow backlog instead of dead-end stateful_skip. Root cause: STATS ISC family (STAT_GetGoldBankMax et al., 7 fns @6fd88cd0-6fd890f0) all delegate to EBX-implicit STATS_GetStatValueWithMinCheck @6fd88a80 which deep-walks pUnit->pStats -- the iter26 crash class hidden one call down. All 8 family members reclassified to shadow backlog in state.db.

journal.improvement: VOID-RETURN MUTATOR GUARD: void fns that deref params or delegate now skip BEFORE any prove/shadow routing. iter28 near-miss: 3 mutators (STAT_RecalculateVitalCosts in-place clamp, STAT_ImportStateFlagsFromBuffer free+realloc, DATATBLS_GetRandomStringB loops STATLIST_AddStat despite "Get" name) reached draft lanes; only flaky malformed minimax responses stopped live calls that could have done wild frees in-process.
